description.default: Choose an option — the messenger stays locked without a password.
description.standalone: Standalone APK without Morgendrot server: mnemonic for direct send/receive — import handoff in settings first.
description.solo: Private mode without boss — like on desktop: unlock vault, import seed, or create new profile.
description.streamlined: Package, mailbox and full node are already from handoff — enter your seed phrase from the boss.

streamlined.walletKeyPlaceholder: Mnemonic (12+ words), IOTA Bech32 secret or 64 hex …
streamlined.hint: From boss: same seed phrase as in the handoff profile. Bech32/hex secret works too. New profile only makes sense without team handoff.
streamlined.advancedCreate: Advanced: create new profile (only without boss handoff)

vault.title: Open vault
vault.subtitle: Unlock with password
vault.noLocalFileSdk: No local vault file — use “Import seed” or “New profile”.
vault.noLocalFileChain: No local file: if the vault is on-chain only, use the same vault password as when saving on-chain — keys load into the session after unlock.
vault.sdkLocalHint: Password alone works only if “save signer import” was enabled last time. Otherwise choose Import seed below and enter mnemonic/secret.

import.title: Import seed
import.subtitle: Restore existing profile (24 words)
import.hint: Vault password and your IOTA mnemonic (12–24 words) or Bech32 secret — required for SIGNER=sdk without stored import.

create.title: Create new profile
create.subtitle: Create a fresh vault
create.existingVault: A vault file already exists — “Open vault” is usually enough.

techNotes.standaloneExtra: Standalone: seed is stored encrypted on device — no Morgendrot backend required.
techNotes.serverExtra: Password decrypts the vault file on device or backend.
techNotes.signerCli: <mono>SIGNER=cli</mono>: IOTA CLI keystore password — no mnemonic here.
techNotes.signerSdk: <mono>SIGNER=sdk</mono>: after one-time import, password alone often suffices under “Open vault”.
techNotes.forgotPassword: Forgot password? Vault content cannot be read without the old password. With seed you can create a new profile — old messaging keys stay in the old vault.
